== Notes for [[Item:Q88563|Q88563]] ==

'''General Notes'''

Death: 568 B.C.

King of Macedonia Aeropus I Argaead was the son of King of Macedonia Philip I Argaead and Nikonoe (?) .3,4,2 King of Macedonia, the Balkan Peninsula, 0602-0576 B.C..

Child of King of Macedonia Aeropus I Argaead:– King of Macedonia Alcetas I Argaead+

# Roderick W. Stuart, Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, Kings of England, and Queen Philippa (.: ., 3rd Ed., 1998), 413-87
# Michael Marcotte's Genealogy: Argead Chart, online
# Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 413-88.
# Herodotus of Halicarnassus, The History of Herodotus (London and New York: MacMillan and Co., 1890).

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01305.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
King of Macedonia

Ruled c. 588 BC - , King of Macedonia

Ruled c. 588 BC - , King of Macedonia

Ruled c. 588 BC - , King of Macedonia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
